game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Bloons TD 6 Bloons TD 6 is a tower defense game where players strategically place and upgrade monkey towers along a path to pop waves of incoming "Bloons" (balloons) before they reach the end. The game features diverse Bloon types requiring specific tower abilities, an in-game cash economy for tower purchases and upgrades, and a "Monkey Knowledge" meta-progression system providing permanent buffs.
game_info.description: Welcome to Monkey Defense! Defend your territory against waves of colorful "Bloons" (balloons) following a winding path. You control a strategic cursor to build and upgrade monkey towers. Strategically place Dart Monkeys, Tack Shooters, and Snipers to pop the Bloons before they reach the end of the path. Manage your cash, upgrade your defenses, and survive as long as possible!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move the building cursor around the map.
- Z: Cycle through available tower types (Dart Monkey -> Tack Shooter -> Sniper).
- Space: Build selected tower at cursor position (if affordable) OR Select/Deselect existing tower to view range.
- Shift: Upgrade the currently selected/hovered tower (if affordable).
- ENTER: Start the game.
- ESC: Pause / Unpause the game.
- R: Restart the game (from Game Over screen).

TEST_1.test_description: Verify that placing a tower pops bloons and increases score/money.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move cursor to a strategic choke point near the start of the path. Place a Dart Monkey immediately. Wait for the first wave to interact with the tower.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player's score and money should increase from the initial values as the tower pops the first red bloon. Game remains in PLAYING state.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify Game Over condition when lives reach zero.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Do nothing. Allow bloons to traverse the entire path without placing any defenses.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Lives should decrease to 0. Game phase should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE.
TEST_2.description: Verify Game Over condition when lives reach zero.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify tower selection and switching mechanic.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Press 'Z' multiple times to cycle through tower types. Observe internal state changes in selected tower type.
